author: design-phase-2b-layout-md-7617
content: Plan: Implement vitreous_layout crate wrapping taffy 0.9 with four files: tree.rs (LayoutInput, LayoutOutput, LayoutStyle, NodeId, MeasureFn, MeasureConstraint, Size, and all flex enums mapped to taffy equivalents), compute.rs (compute_layout() builds taffy tree, registers measure functions, runs layout, extracts results into LayoutOutput), boundary.rs (is_layout_boundary() detection for incremental re-layout optimization), lib.rs (re-exports). Key decisions: own NodeId type (u32 wrapper) separate from taffy's, own enum types that map to taffy for API isolation, MeasureFn as Box<dyn Fn> per design doc, taffy tree rebuilt each frame per design doc. content_size feature is default-enabled in taffy 0.9 so scroll overflow content dimensions are available.
